name: The Heart Center
description_short: Ent Credit Union's Pueblo Main Service Center is a full-service credit union branch offering savings, checking, loans, and ATM access to Colorado residents and owner-members.
description_long: Ent Credit Union was established in 1957 on the former Ent Air Force Base in Colorado Springs and has grown to become Colorado's largest credit union, serving over 500,000 owner-members across 50+ locations statewide. The Pueblo Main Service Center, located at 300 W. 5th Street, functions as a full-service credit union branch providing comprehensive banking and lending products to the local community. The center offers deposit accounts (savings and checking), personal loans, auto loans, mortgage loans, HELOCs, cashier's checks, cash advances, and business banking services. They also provide convenience features including 24-hour drive-up ATMs, instant-issue Ent Visa debit cards, free coin counter services, and Interactive Teller Machines (ITMs) with extended hours. Ent distinguishes itself through its credit union structure, where account holders are owner-members rather than customers, theoretically resulting in lower fees and more favorable loan rates. The Pueblo location specifically emphasizes community engagement, with staff like David Arrieta (Business Banker) who are deeply rooted in the Southern Colorado region. A notable distinction is that Ent maintains Spanish-speaking representatives at most locations to serve non-English speaking members. The credit union is NCUA-insured and operates as an Equal Housing Lender, providing stability and regulatory oversight. However, the Pueblo branch has limited hours (closing at 5:30 PM weekdays, noon on Saturdays, closed Sundays) and does not offer shared branching, though members can access CO-Op ATM and Shared Branching networks elsewhere.
services: Interactive Teller Machines (ITM) with drive-up access
pros: NCUA-insured credit union with over 500,000 owner-members statewide, providing institutional stability
24-hour drive-up ATM and ITM access with extended weekday hours (7 AM-6 PM) beyond standard banking
Lower personal loan rates and minimal fees as standard credit union member benefits
Spanish-speaking staff available at the Pueblo location to serve diverse community members
Instant-issue Ent Visa debit cards available for immediate account activation
Full suite of loan products including mortgages, auto loans, personal loans, and HELOCs under one roof
Free coin counter service and cashier's checks available at the branch
cons: Limited branch hours (closes 5:30 PM weekdays, noon Saturdays, closed Sundays) restrict in-person service access
No shared branching at this location, limiting convenience compared to some competing credit unions
Membership may require affiliation with eligible groups or employers; eligibility criteria not clearly stated on page
Drive-up and lobby services unavailable outside posted hours despite 24-hour ATM availability
best_for: Colorado residents seeking comprehensive credit union banking with lower fees and competitive loan rates
Spanish-speaking individuals in the Pueblo area needing accessible financial services
Small business owners and entrepreneurs in Southern Colorado requiring business banking relationships
Homebuyers and refinancers looking for mortgage lending with local staff expertise
diagnosis: Best for Colorado residents and business owners seeking full-service credit union banking with competitive rates and member-owned structure. Primary caveat is limited branch hours (closes at 5:30 PM weekdays) and lack of shared branching at this specific location, which may inconvenience those needing frequent in-person service or requiring access outside standard business hours.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
